topic: Myth: Making money online is all scams and gambling
caption:
Not every dollar earned online is a red flag.

Your teen can learn to do real, skill-based work online, like reselling, tutoring, or design, and get paid for it.

The difference between a scam and a side hustle is education.

Give them a head start → hustleup.us

#parentingteens #raisingteens #teenparenting #momsofteens #raisingentrepreneurs #teenentrepreneur #lifeskills #moneyskills #teenmoney #sidehustle #futureready #hustleup #teensafeonline #parentingwin
alt_text: A teen sitting at a desk with a laptop, smiling while reviewing a simple earnings tracker, with a parent looking on approvingly in the background.

copy.myth: Making money online is all scams and gambling
copy.fact: Real skills online create real, traceable income.
copy.body: Teens can earn $50-$200/month doing legitimate work: graphic design, reselling, tutoring, or content creation. These are jobs, not jackpots.
